pain_point_label: Supplier Contract Enforcement & Preferred Vendor List Drift

matches.match_rationale: Invoice prices above contracted rates and unapproved vendors are statistical anomalies against a known baseline.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An invoice anomaly monitor comparing every incoming invoice against the preferred vendor list and contracted price schedule.

matches.match_rationale: Invoices arrive as PDFs or paper from informal suppliers. OCR and invoice parsing converts these into structured line-item records.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An invoice ingestion pipeline that parses incoming invoices into structured records for a central procurement dashboard.

matches.match_rationale: Contracts define specific terms buried in unstructured documents. Entity extraction can pull key-value pairs into a structured contract register.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A contract digitization pass extracting pricing tables, payment terms, and penalty clauses from PDF vendor contracts.

matches.match_rationale: The enforcement failure is not just detection but the absence of a workflow that escalates exceptions and blocks payment.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An automated procurement compliance workflow that validates vendor and pricing against the approved list and routes exceptions through an approval chain.
